title: melilotus macrorrhizus var. palustris
intro: Melilotus macrorrhizus var. palustris, also known as palustrine melilot, is a variant of the melilotus plant that is characterized by its enlarged roots. The medicinal properties of palustrine melilot include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain due to its content of isoflavones and other flavonoids. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to support cardiovascular health, reduce menopausal symptoms, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Palustrine melilot can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, with the herbal preparations often used to support women's health and alleviate symptoms associated with menopause.
